events.title: World Red Cross and Red Crescent Day
events.summary: An annual celebration of the principles of the International Red Cross and Red Crescent Movement, paying tribute to staff and volunteers who save lives and assist vulnerable communities.

events.title: National Ovarian Cancer Day (UK)
events.summary: Part of a broader awareness month, this day focuses on educating women about the symptoms of ovarian cancer to encourage early diagnosis and improved survival rates.

events.title: No Socks Day
events.summary: A light-hearted day that encourages people to ditch their hosiery for the day, allowing their feet to breathe and embrace the approaching summer weather.
